site.title: Halim Efe Tuzlu | Product Designer & CPO
site.description: Istanbul-based Product Designer and CPO focused on AI products, design systems, UI/UX, brand identity, and product strategy.

hero.headline: Hi, I'm Efe, a product designer and CPO based in Istanbul, building AI products, design systems and memorable digital experiences.

projects.title: Hant Product Design
projects.goal: The objective was to make AI-assisted travel planning feel clear, personal and ready for a real product launch.
projects.description: I shaped the product experience for Hant, an AI travel planning app, from core strategy and information architecture to itinerary-building flows and decision support.

projects.title: Hant Web Design
projects.goal: The objective was to turn a complex AI product into a focused web presence that explains the value quickly and builds trust.
projects.description: I translated Hant's AI travel concept into a responsive web experience with clear landing flows, product storytelling and interface-led communication.

projects.title: Hant Sales Deck
projects.goal: The objective was to make the AI experience feel responsive, understandable and more memorable through motion.
projects.description: I defined motion behavior for Hant across key product moments, including prototype transitions, interaction rhythm and lightweight storytelling details.

projects.title: En Kıymetlim Product Design
projects.goal: The objective was to make sensitive parenting and care tasks feel calm, accessible and easy to manage day to day.
projects.description: I designed the product experience for En Kiymetlim, a parenting app focused on parent health, child care support and practical daily care flows.

projects.title: En Kıymetlim Brand Identity
projects.goal: The objective was to create a soft, trustworthy identity that could support both emotional reassurance and practical healthcare communication.
projects.description: I shaped the brand identity for En Kiymetlim around a calm visual system for parent health, child care and everyday family support.

projects.title: Sağlık Gelsin Sales Deck
projects.goal: The objective was to build a healthcare communication system that feels reliable, accessible and human.
projects.description: I developed the visual direction for Saglik Gelsin around trust signals, service clarity and approachable communication for a home healthcare brand.

projects.title: Saunakit
projects.goal: The objective was to position a portable sauna as a premium but easy-to-understand wellness product.
projects.description: I created brand and packaging direction for Saunakit, focusing on clear product positioning, a clean visual system and consistent physical product communication.

projects.title: Mambocino
projects.service: Brand Identity, Visual Language, Packaging Direction
projects.goal: The objective was to create a playful but polished coffee identity that could scale across packaging and product communication.
projects.description: I shaped the Mambocino brand around naming, packaging and a shelf-ready visual system for specialty coffee products.

projects.title: Samurai Bros
projects.service: Brand Identity, Packaging Direction, Product Visuals
projects.goal: The objective was to create a bold, shelf-ready cold brew identity with a strong black-and-white packaging system.
projects.description: I designed the Samurai Bros packaging system with bold contrast, clear product hierarchy and a bottle-first presentation that reads well both on shelf and in close-up product visuals.

projects.title: Sales Training Game
projects.goal: The objective was to make sales training more interactive, easier to retain and more engaging than a static learning flow.
projects.description: I designed an interactive sales training game concept with motion direction, UX rhythm and lightweight gameplay patterns for learning scenarios.

projects.title: Sağlık Gelsin Product Design
projects.goal: Make home healthcare requests feel clear, trustworthy and easy to complete.
projects.description: I designed the product direction for Sağlık Gelsin, a home healthcare app that helps people request nurses, physiotherapists and care services with clearer flows and stronger trust cues.

site.title: Halim Efe Tuzlu | Ürün Tasarımcısı & CPO
site.description: İstanbul merkezli; AI ürünleri, tasarım sistemleri, UI/UX, marka kimliği ve ürün stratejisi odağında çalışan ürün tasarımcısı ve CPO.

hero.headline: Merhaba, ben Efe. İstanbul'da AI ürünleri, tasarım sistemleri ve akılda kalan dijital deneyimler tasarlayan bir ürün tasarımcısı ve CPO'yum.

hant-product-design.title: Hant Ürün Tasarımı
hant-product-design.description: Hant için ürün deneyimini; temel stratejiden bilgi mimarisine, seyahat planlama akışlarından karar destek anlarına kadar tasarladım.

hant-web-design.title: Hant Web Tasarımı
hant-web-design.description: Hant'ın AI seyahat konseptini; net landing akışları, ürün hikayesi ve arayüz odaklı iletişimle responsive bir web deneyimine taşıdım.

hant-sales-deck.title: Hant Motion Design
hant-sales-deck.description: Hant'ın önemli ürün anları için prototip geçişleri, etkileşim ritmi ve hafif hikaye anlatımı detaylarını kapsayan motion davranışını tanımladım.

en-kiymetlim-product-design.title: En Kıymetlim Ürün Tasarımı
en-kiymetlim-product-design.description: En Kıymetlim için ebeveyn sağlığı, çocuk bakım desteği ve günlük bakım akışlarına odaklanan ürün deneyimini tasarladım.

en-kiymetlim-brand-identity.title: En Kıymetlim Marka Kimliği
en-kiymetlim-brand-identity.description: En Kıymetlim'in marka kimliğini ebeveyn sağlığı, çocuk bakımı ve aile desteği için sakin bir görsel sistem etrafında şekillendirdim.

saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.title: Sağlık Gelsin Sales Deck
saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.description: Sağlık Gelsin için güven sinyalleri, hizmet netliği ve ulaşılabilir iletişim üzerine kurulu görsel yönlendirmeyi geliştirdim.

saglik-gelsin-product-design.title: Sağlık Gelsin Ürün Tasarımı
saglik-gelsin-product-design.description: Sağlık Gelsin için hemşire, fizyoterapist ve bakım hizmeti talep etmeyi daha net, güvenilir ve kolay hale getiren ürün yönünü tasarladım.

saunakit.title: Saunakit Marka Kimliği
saunakit.description: Saunakit için net ürün konumlandırması, temiz bir görsel sistem ve fiziksel ürün iletişiminde tutarlılık sağlayan marka ve ambalaj yönünü oluşturdum.

mambocino.title: Mambocino Marka Kimliği
mambocino.description: Mambocino markasını isimlendirme, ambalaj ve raf hazırı görsel sistem odağında şekillendirdim.

samurai-bros.title: Samurai Bros Ambalaj Tasarımı
samurai-bros.description: Samurai Bros için güçlü kontrast, net ürün hiyerarşisi ve şişe odaklı sunumla hem rafta hem yakın plan ürün görsellerinde iyi okunan bir ambalaj sistemi tasarladım.

sales-training-game.title: Satış Eğitim Oyunu
sales-training-game.description: Öğrenme senaryoları için motion yönlendirme, UX ritmi ve hafif oyunlaştırma kalıplarına sahip interaktif bir satış eğitimi oyunu konsepti tasarladım.

site.title: Halim Efe Tuzlu | Produktdesigner & CPO
site.description: Produktdesigner und CPO in Istanbul mit Fokus auf KI-Produkte, Designsysteme, UI/UX, Markenidentität und Produktstrategie.

hero.headline: Hi, ich bin Efe, ein Produktdesigner und CPO aus Istanbul. Ich entwickle KI-Produkte, Designsysteme und einprägsame digitale Erlebnisse.

hant-product-design.title: Hant Produktdesign
hant-product-design.goal: Ziel war es, KI-gestützte Reiseplanung klar, persönlich und bereit für einen echten Produktlaunch wirken zu lassen.
hant-product-design.description: Ich gestaltete die Produkterfahrung für Hant, eine KI-Reiseplanungs-App, von der Kernstrategie und Informationsarchitektur bis zu Reiseplanungsflows und Entscheidungsunterstützung.

hant-web-design.title: Hant Webdesign
hant-web-design.description: Ich überführte Hants KI-Reisekonzept in ein responsives Web-Erlebnis mit klaren Landing-Flows, Produktstorytelling und interface-geführter Kommunikation.

hant-sales-deck.title: Hant Motion Design
hant-sales-deck.description: Ich definierte das Motion-Verhalten für zentrale Produktmomente von Hant, inklusive Prototyp-Übergängen, Interaktionsrhythmus und leichtem Storytelling.

en-kiymetlim-product-design.title: En Kıymetlim Produktdesign
en-kiymetlim-product-design.description: Ich gestaltete die Produkterfahrung für En Kıymetlim mit Fokus auf Eltern-Gesundheit, Kinderbetreuung und praktische tägliche Care-Flows.

en-kiymetlim-brand-identity.title: En Kıymetlim Markenidentität
en-kiymetlim-brand-identity.description: Ich entwickelte die Markenidentität für En Kıymetlim rund um ein ruhiges visuelles System für Eltern-Gesundheit, Kinderbetreuung und Familienalltag.

saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.title: Sağlık Gelsin Sales Deck
saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.description: Ich entwickelte die visuelle Richtung für Sağlık Gelsin rund um Vertrauen, Serviceklarheit und zugängliche Kommunikation für häusliche Gesundheitsversorgung.

saglik-gelsin-product-design.title: Sağlık Gelsin Produktdesign
saglik-gelsin-product-design.description: Ich gestaltete die Produktrichtung für Sağlık Gelsin, eine App, mit der Menschen Pflegekräfte, Physiotherapeuten und Betreuungsleistungen klarer und vertrauensvoller anfragen können.

saunakit.title: Saunakit Markenidentität
saunakit.description: Ich entwickelte Marken- und Packaging-Richtung für Saunakit mit Fokus auf klare Produktpositionierung, ein sauberes visuelles System und konsistente Kommunikation für ein physisches Produkt.

mambocino.title: Mambocino Markenidentität
mambocino.description: Ich entwickelte die Marke Mambocino rund um Naming, Packaging und ein regalfertiges visuelles System für Specialty-Coffee-Produkte.

samurai-bros.title: Samurai Bros Packaging Design
samurai-bros.description: Ich entwarf das Packaging-System für Samurai Bros mit starkem Kontrast, klarer Produkthierarchie und einer flaschenzentrierten Präsentation, die im Regal und im Close-up funktioniert.

sales-training-game.title: Sales Training Game
sales-training-game.description: Ich gestaltete ein interaktives Sales-Training-Game-Konzept mit Motion Direction, UX-Rhythmus und leichten Gameplay-Mustern für Lernszenarien.

site.title: Halim Efe Tuzlu | Diseñador de Producto & CPO
site.description: Diseñador de producto y CPO en Estambul, enfocado en productos de IA, sistemas de diseño, UI/UX, identidad de marca y estrategia de producto.

hero.headline: Hola, soy Efe, diseñador de producto y CPO en Estambul. Creo productos de IA, sistemas de diseño y experiencias digitales memorables.

hant-product-design.title: Hant Diseño de Producto
hant-product-design.goal: El objetivo fue hacer que la planificación de viajes asistida por IA se sintiera clara, personal y lista para un lanzamiento real.
hant-product-design.description: Diseñé la experiencia de producto para Hant, una app de planificación de viajes con IA, desde la estrategia central y la arquitectura de información hasta los flujos de itinerario y soporte de decisión.

hant-web-design.title: Hant Diseño Web
hant-web-design.description: Convertí el concepto de viajes con IA de Hant en una experiencia web responsive con landing flows claros, storytelling de producto y comunicación guiada por la interfaz.

hant-sales-deck.title: Hant Motion Design
hant-sales-deck.description: Definí el comportamiento motion de Hant en momentos clave del producto, incluyendo transiciones de prototipo, ritmo de interacción y detalles ligeros de storytelling.

en-kiymetlim-product-design.title: En Kıymetlim Diseño de Producto
en-kiymetlim-product-design.description: Diseñé la experiencia de producto para En Kıymetlim, una app de parentalidad centrada en salud de padres, apoyo al cuidado infantil y flujos prácticos para el día a día.

en-kiymetlim-brand-identity.title: En Kıymetlim Identidad de Marca
en-kiymetlim-brand-identity.description: Construí la identidad de marca de En Kıymetlim alrededor de un sistema visual tranquilo para salud parental, cuidado infantil y apoyo familiar cotidiano.

saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.title: Sağlık Gelsin Sales Deck
saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.scope: App para solicitar enfermería y fisioterapia
saglik-gelsin-brand-identity.description: Desarrollé la dirección visual de Sağlık Gelsin alrededor de señales de confianza, claridad de servicio y comunicación accesible para salud a domicilio.

saglik-gelsin-product-design.title: Sağlık Gelsin Diseño de Producto
saglik-gelsin-product-design.description: Diseñé la dirección de producto de Sağlık Gelsin, una app para solicitar enfermeros, fisioterapeutas y servicios de cuidado con flujos más claros y señales de confianza más fuertes.

saunakit.title: Saunakit Identidad de Marca
saunakit.service: Logo e identidad visual, dirección de packaging
saunakit.description: Creé la dirección de marca y packaging para Saunakit con foco en posicionamiento claro, un sistema visual limpio y comunicación consistente para un producto físico.

mambocino.title: Mambocino Identidad de Marca
mambocino.service: Identidad de marca, lenguaje visual, dirección de packaging
mambocino.description: Construí la marca Mambocino alrededor de naming, packaging y un sistema visual listo para retail para productos de café de especialidad.

samurai-bros.title: Samurai Bros Diseño de Packaging
samurai-bros.service: Identidad de marca, dirección de packaging, visuales de producto
samurai-bros.description: Diseñé el sistema de packaging de Samurai Bros con contraste fuerte, jerarquía clara de producto y una presentación centrada en botella que funciona tanto en anaquel como en visuales de producto.

sales-training-game.title: Sales Training Game
sales-training-game.description: Diseñé un concepto interactivo de juego para entrenamiento de ventas con dirección motion, ritmo UX y patrones ligeros de gameplay para escenarios de aprendizaje.
